name: Trade Flow Exhaustion (Short)
hypothesis: Extreme buyer-initiated trade flow, as measured by a high positive z-score of trade_imbalance_signed, often marks a point of exhaustion or a 'bull trap' rather than the start of a continued move up. This spec hypothesizes that such an event is a high-probability predictor of a near-term price reversal downwards. We therefore take a short position (long_if_neg).
mutation_note: The parent spec had a dismal WR of 38.2%, and feedback indicated it was likely identifying exhaustion points but betting the wrong way. This new spec directly tests the core exhaustion hypothesis by using the key primitive (trade imbalance z-score) as a standalone short signal (long_if_neg).
